settings.label: Our Story
settings.heading: Born From The Miles
settings.subtitle: Aura Running was born at mile 67 of a 100-mile ultra, when every product had failed. We knew there had to be something better.

settings.title: Science First
settings.description: Every formula is developed with scientific rigor and tested across thousands of miles.

settings.title: Clean Formula
settings.description: No synthetic fragrances, no parabens, no petroleum. Just ingredients that work.

settings.title: Athlete Proven
settings.description: Tested by ultrarunners, marathoners, and triathletes in the most demanding conditions on earth.
